arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United vs. Real Sociedad in Europa League
Paul Scholes pinpoints reason for Rasmus Hojlund struggles amid 18-game goal drought - as Man United legend explains how the striker can turn his form around
arts.sum: Hojlund is currently on an 18-match goal drought and the Danish forward has been taken off in recent Manchester United matches to be replaced by 17-year-old striker Chido Obi.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United discover asking price in Bayern Munich transfer battle for Bundesliga star?
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller, who is also attracting interest from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Three senior executives to leave Man Utd this summer
arts.sum: Three senior executives will leave Manchester United this summer, including the person responsible for delivering the latest round of redundancies.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes provides Ruben Amorim verdict as Man United sack timeline set
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has won just 11 matches since taking charge of the Reds in the middle of November

arts.ttl: TNT Sport pundits disagree about how much pressure Ruben Amorim is under - as Paul Scholes reveals how long he needs to rebuild Man United
arts.sum: Amorim was brought in in November to replace Erik ten Hag at the end of his disappointing tenure at Old Trafford, and has been tasked with rebuilding the club back to their glory.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta's admission on Ruben Amorim as Man Utd eye £50m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United's striker search has seen Jean-Philippe Mateta's name come up, and the French striker had his say about Ruben Amorim's side after February's league clash

arts.ttl: 'Talk about it all the time' - Ruben Amorim explains his Manchester United plan vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man Utd play Real Sociedad in the Europa League on Thursday night and Ruben Amorim spoke ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Why Martin Zubimendi is not playing for Real Sociedad vs Man United amid Arsenal transfer claim
arts.sum: Manchester United have been handed an unexpected boost ahead of their Europa League round of 16 clash with Real Sociedad this evening

arts.ttl: Man United 'eye audacious summer move for Crystal Palace star'- as top target Viktor Gyokeres 'cools on Old Trafford transfer', with the club unlikely to qualify for Champions League
arts.sum: Mateta has been in inspired form for the Eagles, scoring 15 goals in 33 matches. His emergence has coincided with the arrival of Oliver Glasner.
